definitions.text: As an auxiliary verb: Used with past participles of verbs to form the passive voice.
examples: The dog was saved by the boy.

definitions.text: Used with past participles of verbs to form the passive voice.
examples: The dog was saved by the boy.

definitions.text: Used with present participles of verbs to form the continuous aspect.
examples: I shall be writing to you soon.

definitions.text: Alternative form of by. Also found in compounds, especially oaths, e.g. begorra.
The name of the Cyrillic script letter Б / б

translations: formy: am / is / are (present); was / were (past); been (past participle)
